examples.title: Agglomerative Hierarchical Clustering
examples.description: A simple implementation of agglomerative hierarchical clustering.
examples.code:
ALGORITHM AgglomerativeClustering
BEGIN
  Initialize clusters as individual data points
  WHILE number of clusters > 1 DO
    Find the closest pair of clusters
    Merge the clusters
  END WHILE
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode implements agglomerative hierarchical clustering by merging clusters based on their similarity.
